projectDescription: A Chrome extension that extracts computed styles from any website and generates DESIGN.md or SKILL.md files for use with AI coding tools like Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor.
keyFeatures: Auto-extracts computed styles (typography, colors, spacing, radius, shadows, motion) from any visible website
Generates DESIGN.md files following the TypeUI DESIGN.md open format
Generates SKILL.md agent-ready files with frontmatter for AI tool integration
One-click Quick Install to Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor project directories
Built-in validation against required sections, WCAG 2.2 AA, and interaction states
Site profiling to infer brand context, audience, and product surface from page signals
Token normalization pipeline that deduplicates raw values into semantic token sets
Download and clipboard copy support for generated markdown
publicApiSurface: normalizeExtractedStyles(payload) — normalizes raw computed styles into semantic token rows
generateDesignMarkdown(context) — generates DESIGN.md markdown from normalized styles
generateSkillMarkdown(context) — generates SKILL.md markdown with frontmatter from normalized styles
validateMarkdownOutput(mode, markdown) — validates generated markdown against required structure
Chrome message: RUN_EXTRACTION — triggers style extraction and markdown generation for a tab
Chrome message: DOWNLOAD_MARKDOWN — triggers browser download of generated markdown file
Content script: extractStylesFromPage() — collects computed styles from visible DOM elements
